event.freeformPrompt: this is too long. ive always been looking at new emerging trends, then build something / proto with them to better understand them. now its AI

element.textContent: I work between emerging technology, organisational change, and the human systems underneath both. The work is turning ambiguous possibilities into practice teams can actually keep: applied AI, product and platform systems, and the facilitation that makes the change stick.
element.outerHTML: I work between emerging technology, organisational change, and the human systems underneath both. The work is turning ambiguous possibilities into practice teams can actually keep: applied AI, product and platform systems, and the facilitation that makes the change stick.
